title: 有馬記念の後に・惜敗と稲妻

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... I lost.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to live up to everyone's
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't win. At the end of the day, that's all
that matters.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I could hear people sighing with disappointment.
I... I...

...Oguri Cap stands motionless, proving just how
frustrating this loss is to her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Good job out there, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I won this time. So... do you want to
end our rivalry here?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: N-no...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then you've got to keep moving forward. I'll be
waiting for you a little further down the line.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I plan to win next time too though—so you'd best
come prepared!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not gonna lose again.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I need to get stronger and prove that I can beat
Creek next time!

Driven by Super Creek's words, Oguri Cap is
already looking toward the future.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've gotta get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Creek said she'd be waiting for me further down
the line. She must have been talking about next
year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That means I have to qualify. And next time, I'm gonna beat her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't want to disappoint anyone anymore!

Oguri Cap is more than competent enough as she
is. All she needs to do now is keep gaining
experience in G1 races.

There, she'll be able to polish her skills by facing
off against many powerful competitors. Such
experiences will surely expedite her growth.
choice_data_list: Okay! Let's enter as many races as we can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right!

She's all fired up! But just as we're about to
discuss which race to take on next, a familiar face
interrupts us.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry to butt in!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was watchin' the whole time! Ya did great,
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I could tell you were really puttin' your all into it.
Seriously, great job.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Tama—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: H-hey, you okay?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I'm fine. I just feel a little weak...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because I've been wanting to see you.
The wave of relief must've been a little much for
me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, you cut that out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
D'ya think I'm your momma or somethin'? 'Cause
I'm pretty sure I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm an Umamusume! Have ya forgotten that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? Of course not. What else would you be?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The heck kind of answer is that? Don'tcha know what that means?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What I'm tryin' to say is dat I'm your rival as well!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now ya get it! So it's decided! We gotta go
head-to-head!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I was plannin' on aimin' for the Dream
Trophy next year.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh really?

The Dream Trophy League—a higher-level league
where Umamusume who have proven themselves
in the Twinkle Series compete.

Having debuted a little earlier than Oguri Cap,
aiming for the Dream Trophy League should be
the natural next step for Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But after seein' your battle with Creek, I made up
my mind to stay back for a year and prove I can
beat ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's determine once and for all who's the
best—me, you, or Creek!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Got that, Oguri? I'm your opponent next time!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I'm fine. All right, let's get to work on our next
plan.

Oguri Cap's battle with Super Creek may be over,
but now she has another powerful rival who wants
to take her on.

She seems to have a lot to mull over. It's time for
the two of us to get to work.
